title: Swords from anime
description: This texture pack replaces the swords in the game with 3D anime swords such as Blitch, Berserker, and The Blade that cuts through demons. The texture pack was created by a beginner and only for the sake of a "beautiful picture".
body: This texture pack replaces the swords in the game with 3D anime swords such as Blitch, Berserker, and The Blade that cuts through demons. The texture pack was created by a beginner and only for the sake of a "beautiful picture".
